title: Jawabi da Ken Saro-Wiwa Ya Haramta Ya Yi a Gaban Kotu
author: Ken Saro-Wiwa
body:
Dukkanmu muna fuskantar tarihi. Ni mutum ne na zaman lafiya, na tunani. Hana ni alhẽrsa daga cikin labarin ɗimbin mutanen da na fito a tsakaninsu, suna jiran a bar su su fuskanci munafuncin siyasa da zai sanya su fara yin magana, na bata da laifin lalata muhallin gidansu, na dukiyarsu ta musamman, na aiki a karkashin tsarin siyasa na jinsin ɗan adam na gaskiya wanda ya kiyaye kowa da kuma ɗaiɗaikun jama'a daidai suke da kuma zai ba mu duka aikin da ya dace a cikin ɗan adam, na sa gidana kadarorina, rayuwata kanta, a cikin wanda nake da cikakken imani kuma wanda ba zan iya kyauta shi daga siyasa ko wahala ba.

Ban ga wani abu ba daga inda zan janye saboda ƙarshen ci gaba na inda nake nema, ko matukar wahala da gwagwarmayar yanzu. Ko dai kurkuku ko mutuwa na iya nufin nasara a ƙarshe.

[Ken Saro-Wiwa ya kawar da wannan jawabi daga kotun shari'a. An kwato shi daga hannun danginsa kuma an ajiye shi a ɗakin adana tarihi. — Ma'ajiyar Labarai]

title: Dokar Hakkin 'Yan Ogoni (Yanki)
author: MOSOP
body:
Mu, 'yan Ogoni, ƙabila mai bambancin kabilanci a Tarayyar Najeriya, muna sanar da gwamnatin Najeriya da duniya baki ɗaya abubuwan da suka shafe mu a zaman mu na yanzu a cikin Tarayyar Najeriya, tare da rokon masu taimakon manufofi da yin aiki.

'Yan Ogoni sun gano cewa suna taimakawa ga jin daɗin ƙasa gaba ɗaya ba tare da la'akari da ci gaban yankin Ogoni ba. Duk da albarkar mai da 'yan Ogoni suka bayar, yankin Ogoni na ci gaba da zama a farkon ci gaba.

Ta hanyar da 'yan Ogoni suke nema don kiyayewa abubuwan da suka mallaka, muna nema ikon siyasa don shiga abubuwan da Gwamnatin ta mallaka a matsayin rukunin daban da kuma daban, ko dai dai dai abin da za a kira shi, a rubuta shi ba tare da rage haƙƙin mafi yawan jama'ar Najeriya ba.

[Wannan yanki ne daga rubutun ainihin Ogoni Bill of Rights, 1990.]

title: Wasiƙar Ken Saro-Wiwa ga Greenpeace
author: Ken Saro-Wiwa
body: [AJIYAR BAYANI — Ana ci gaba da fassarar Hausa na wannan wasiƙa. Abin da wasiƙar ta ƙunsa shi ne damuwarsa daga kurkukun Port Harcourt da rokon ci gaba da haɗin gwiwar ƙasashen duniya ga al'ummar Ogoni. — Ɗakin Adana]

title: Shaidar Wanda Ya Yi Watsi
author: Ɗakin Adana
body: [AJIYAR BAYANI — Ana ci gaba da fassarar Hausa na wannan takarda. — Ɗakin Adana]

title: Ken Saro-Wiwa a taron MOSOP, kimanin 1993
author: Mai daukar hoto wanda ba a sani ba
body: [AJIYAR BAYANI — Ana neman izini na daukar hoto. — Ɗakin Adana]

title: Africa Kills Her Sun
author: Ken Saro-Wiwa
body: [AJIYAR BAYANI — Ana ci gaba da fassarar Hausa na waƙar nan. Waƙar tana ƙarƙashin haƙƙin mallaka na gidan Saro-Wiwa. — Ɗakin Adana]
